title: MeshRequiredArea
description: MeshRequiredArea: Minimum required area of reinforcement for an AreaElement.

TopPrimary.description: Minimum required area of reinforcement in the top layer in the local x direction of the Panel. Property has a quantity of type AreaPerUnitLength measured in [m²/m].

TopSecondary.description: Minimum required area of reinforcement in the top layer in the local y direction of the Panel. Property has a quantity of type AreaPerUnitLength measured in [m²/m].

BottomPrimary.description: Minimum required area of reinforcement in the bottom layer in the local x direction of the Panel. Property has a quantity of type AreaPerUnitLength measured in [m²/m].

BottomSecondary.description: Minimum required area of reinforcement in the bottom layer in the local y direction of the Panel. Property has a quantity of type AreaPerUnitLength measured in [m²/m].

Shear.description: Minimum required area of shear reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type AreaPerUnitLength measured in [m²/m].

Torsion.description: Minimum required area of torsion reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type AreaPerUnitLength measured in [m²/m].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

LayerPosition.description: Position within the element thickness that result is extracted from, normalised to 1. I.e. 0 = lower surface, 0.5 = middle, 1 = top surface.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
